title: The Personalized Pack
body:
![tpp_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b9ea2485b4b33af4332b5f5f238d2632006d9a7.png)

# Features!
- Simple and Easy to learn magic 🔮
- Better ambience 🌳
- Many new structures 🌆
- More advancements 🏆
- Lots of food 🌭
- Enchantment Overhaul 📖
- New and Overhauled Dimensions 🌌
- Gravestones and Graveyards 🪦
- More Bosses ⚔️
- Mechanical Technologies ⚙️
- Optimizations ⚡
- and more!
# About the Modpack
For a while, I've had the goal of playing on a single world/server with friends for as long as possible and be able to not get bored. This modpack aims to fulfill that goal. This modpack includes many mods that were carefully picked to give players of all interests something to enjoy. From spell casting and decorating to exploring and engineering, the possibilities are further limitless.
# Anything Else?
I'd like to thank my friends for filling out a survey to help me with this modpack. This modpack would literally not exist without them and their help.
# Update The Modpack To 1.21!!!!!!!
Nah
